domain: AI Agent Browser Automation & Computer Use

open_source_browser_agent_frameworks.name: Browser Use
open_source_browser_agent_frameworks.description: Leading open-source framework for AI browser agents. Gives LLM full autonomous browser control with re-reasoning at every step.
open_source_browser_agent_frameworks.approach: Full autonomous agent loop with LLM reasoning

open_source_browser_agent_frameworks.name: Stagehand
open_source_browser_agent_frameworks.description: AI browser automation SDK by Browserbase. Adds surgical AI primitives (act, extract, observe) on top of Playwright for hybrid workflows.

open_source_browser_agent_frameworks.name: Skyvern
open_source_browser_agent_frameworks.description: Uses Vision-LLMs to understand web pages via screenshots, not DOM parsing. Best performing agent on WRITE tasks (forms, logins, downloads).

open_source_browser_agent_frameworks.name: Crawl4AI
open_source_browser_agent_frameworks.description: LLM-friendly web crawler outputting clean markdown. 4x faster than competitors.
open_source_browser_agent_frameworks.approach: Web crawling optimized for LLM consumption

open_source_browser_agent_frameworks.name: LaVague
open_source_browser_agent_frameworks.description: Large Action Model framework for developing AI Web Agents. Natural language web automation.

open_source_browser_agent_frameworks.name: Notte
open_source_browser_agent_frameworks.description: Web agent framework with perception layer that transforms web pages into structured navigable maps. Hybrid scripting + AI approach cuts costs 50%+.

open_source_browser_agent_frameworks.name: Nanobrowser
open_source_browser_agent_frameworks.description: Open source AI web agent running as browser extension.

open_source_browser_agent_frameworks.name: Agent Browser (Vercel Labs)
open_source_browser_agent_frameworks.description: Open-source CLI tool for browser automation by AI agents.

open_source_browser_agent_frameworks.name: AgentQL
open_source_browser_agent_frameworks.description: Query language and toolkit making the web AI-ready. Semantic targeting of web elements via natural language queries.
open_source_browser_agent_frameworks.approach: Semantic query language for web elements

platform_provider_computer_use_agents.name: OpenAI Operator (CUA)
platform_provider_computer_use_agents.description: Cloud-based virtual browser assistant that navigates websites and fills forms. Computer Using Agent (CUA).

platform_provider_computer_use_agents.name: Anthropic Claude Computer Use
platform_provider_computer_use_agents.description: Claude can control computers via screenshots and mouse/keyboard actions. Runs in sandbox environments (Docker/VMs).

platform_provider_computer_use_agents.name: Google Project Mariner
platform_provider_computer_use_agents.description: Google's browser agent handling 10 concurrent tasks on cloud-based VMs. Chrome-optimized.

platform_provider_computer_use_agents.name: OpenClaw
platform_provider_computer_use_agents.description: Open-source autonomous AI agent running locally. Controls computer via messaging platforms (WhatsApp, Discord, Signal). 100+ AgentSkills.
platform_provider_computer_use_agents.notes: Creator hired by OpenAI. Security concerns re: prompt injection.

consumer_ai_browsers.name: ChatGPT Atlas
consumer_ai_browsers.description: AI browser built into ChatGPT with Agent Mode for multi-step workflows (form filling, product comparison, booking).

consumer_ai_browsers.name: Perplexity Comet
consumer_ai_browsers.description: Research-focused AI browser with citation-backed answers, context across tabs, automatic synthesis.

consumer_ai_browsers.name: Fellou
consumer_ai_browsers.description: Agentic browser for deep research, workflow automation, AI-driven report generation. Privacy-focused with local data storage.

consumer_ai_browsers.name: Dia Browser
consumer_ai_browsers.description: AI-native browser with built-in assistant capabilities.

cloud_browser_infrastructure.name: Browserbase
cloud_browser_infrastructure.description: Cloud browser infrastructure for AI agents. Serverless Playwright/Puppeteer/Selenium at scale with stealth mode, session persistence.

cloud_browser_infrastructure.name: Steel
cloud_browser_infrastructure.description: Open-source browser API. Self-host via Docker or use managed cloud. Batteries-included browser sandbox.

cloud_browser_infrastructure.name: Anchor Browser
cloud_browser_infrastructure.description: Cloud-hosted agentic browser automation infrastructure. Full browser isolation, VPN, CAPTCHA solving, anti-bot bypass.

cloud_browser_infrastructure.name: Airtop
cloud_browser_infrastructure.description: Cloud browsers controlled via natural language. No-code AI browser automation.

cloud_browser_infrastructure.name: BrowserAI
cloud_browser_infrastructure.description: Serverless browser with fastest startup (~1 sec). Optimized for quick on-demand AI tasks.

cloud_browser_infrastructure.name: Bright Data Scraping Browser
cloud_browser_infrastructure.description: Enterprise scraping browser with proxy networks. 95% success rate.

no_code_rpa_workflow_tools.name: Axiom AI
no_code_rpa_workflow_tools.description: No-code browser automation and web scraping via visual builder.

no_code_rpa_workflow_tools.name: Browserflow
no_code_rpa_workflow_tools.description: Visual browser automation for business workflows.

no_code_rpa_workflow_tools.name: Bardeen AI
no_code_rpa_workflow_tools.description: Browser extension with AI playbooks and background agents for GTM automation.

no_code_rpa_workflow_tools.name: Browse AI
no_code_rpa_workflow_tools.description: No-code data extraction by recording browser actions.

enterprise_rpa_with_ai_agents.name: UiPath (Agentic Automation)
enterprise_rpa_with_ai_agents.description: Market leader (~30% share). Now integrating AI agents with traditional RPA. Supports Gemini, OpenAI, NVIDIA NIM, Azure AI.

enterprise_rpa_with_ai_agents.name: Automation Anywhere
enterprise_rpa_with_ai_agents.description: Cloud-native RPA with GenAI agents and document automation.

enterprise_rpa_with_ai_agents.name: Microsoft Power Automate
enterprise_rpa_with_ai_agents.description: RPA + AI agents integrated with Microsoft ecosystem.

developer_scraping_tools.name: Firecrawl
developer_scraping_tools.description: Developer-first: turns websites into clean LLM-ready data (Markdown/JSON) via single API call.

developer_scraping_tools.name: Apify
developer_scraping_tools.description: Actor-based web scraping platform with marketplace for prebuilt scrapers.

developer_scraping_tools.name: Kadoa
developer_scraping_tools.description: Enterprise autonomous scraping at scale. No script maintenance.

developer_scraping_tools.name: Oxylabs AI Studio
developer_scraping_tools.description: Low-code AI-powered data extraction via natural language.

traditional_browser_automation_upgraded.name: Playwright (+ Playwright MCP)
traditional_browser_automation_upgraded.description: Microsoft's browser automation framework. MCP server enables LLM interaction via accessibility snapshots without screenshots.

traditional_browser_automation_upgraded.name: Selenium
traditional_browser_automation_upgraded.description: Classic browser automation framework, now with AI integrations.

traditional_browser_automation_upgraded.name: Puppeteer
traditional_browser_automation_upgraded.description: Chrome/Chromium automation by Google. Used under the hood by many AI tools.

multimodal_ai_agent_platforms.name: MultiOn
multimodal_ai_agent_platforms.description: Motor Cortex layer for AI. Autonomous web actions via natural language. Millions of concurrent agents. Best-in-class structured data scraping.

multimodal_ai_agent_platforms.name: Agent Zero
multimodal_ai_agent_platforms.description: Open source agentic framework and computer assistant.
